These release notes are for a version that is still in development and has not been released yet.

---

### 2026.3.1

This is a hotfix release for 2026.3.

- Fixes a bug where some dates (like "since") were not showing on the subscription page when you
  have an active subscription. Thanks Brennon for reporting / suggesting the fix!
- Upgrades the latest JS packages.
- Removes the `legacy-peer-deps` installation flags that were added for `tailwindcss/vite` which
  now supports Vite 8.
